title: watch.rs: to_string_lossy().to_string() double-allocation
description:
LOCATION: src/watch.rs line 116

FINDING: file_path.to_string_lossy().to_string() calls to_string_lossy() which returns a Cow<str>, then .to_string() which unconditionally allocates a new String regardless of whether the path was already valid UTF-8. The idiomatic form is .to_string_lossy().into_owned() which skips the extra copy when the Cow is already Owned, or .to_str().map(str::to_owned) to make the lossy conversion explicit.

IMPACT: One extra String allocation per file event in the watcher hot path. Minor but non-idiomatic.
